name: Eddie Allen
abstract: Eddie Allen (born July 12, 1957) is an American jazz trumpeter and flugelhornist from Milwaukee.

concerts.label: Shoshana Bean, Singer
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

works.t: One for My Baby (and One More for the Road)

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Foster
about_quotes.evidence: Bruce Williams, Eddie Allen, Cecil Bridgewater... That consists -- that’s what the Swing Plus dance band consists of. So Swing Plus in effect is a descendant of Twelve and Living Color.
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Foster — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Bob Shoffner
about_quotes.evidence: Eddie Allen, who knew me before I went in on me, after coming home, he said, why don't you go down and see Charlie Crisp?

about_quotes.speaker: Sidney Desvigne
about_quotes.evidence: Bob Sharper turned the leadership over to Eddie Allen. And that made a hard feelings.

about_quotes.speaker: Willie Foster
about_quotes.evidence: When I got on the boat, Eddie Allen from St. Louis had charge of the boat.

about_quotes.speaker: George "Pops" Foster
about_quotes.evidence: Then Eddie Allen's got the band, they call it the Gold Whispin' Band, see.
